ec2.launchtemplate.privateipadd.CfnAbout:
Specifies a secondary private IPv4 address for a network interface.

`PrivateIpAdd` is a property of [AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate NetworkInterface](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-ec2-launchtemplate-networkinterface.html).

ec2.launchtemplate.privateipadd.Primary.Description: Indicates whether the private IPv4 address is the primary private IPv4 address. Only one IPv4 address can be designated as primary.
